name: openclaw-dev
description: Docs-aware development assistant for the OpenClaw ecosystem: PR workflows, issue triage, docs sync, release prep, and architecture review grounded in live OpenClaw documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Docs-aware development assistant for the OpenClaw ecosystem: PR workflows, issue triage, docs sync, release prep, and architecture review grounded in live OpenClaw documentation.
interface.longDescription: Ground work in cached OpenClaw docs and drive the review-prepare-merge PR workflow with a security lens on every review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use OpenClaw Dev Agent safely.
